justification: The diff performs a mechanical javax -> jakarta namespace migration and updates build tool versions (Spring 6.0.5 -> 6.1.21, compiler 3.10.1 -> 3.15.0, surefire 2.22.2 -> 3.1.2) and target release (17 -> 21), but introduces no Java 21 idioms (e.g., pattern matching for switch, record patterns, virtual threads, or sequence protocols). While it correctly removes deprecated JUnit 4/Vintage dependencies in favor of JUnit Jupiter, the massive churn of identical catch-block rewrites across dozens of files without leveraging modern language features or refactoring the repetitive adapter pattern keeps the idiomatic score low.
